title: Eugenia pitra
taxonomy: Eugenia pitra is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. The Myrtaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the myrtle family. This family includes over 3,000 species of plants, many of which are native to Australia, the Pacific Islands, and the tropical regions of the Americas. Members of the Myrtaceae family are often characterized by their aromatic leaves and showy flowers. Eugenia pitra is a specific species within this family and is likely to have its own unique characteristics.
